text: I've decided to create this space to document my journey,
share my thoughts on various subjects
and connect with people who share similar interests.
I am an avid explorer of ideas,
and the intersection of art and science.
Through this blog, I hope to weave stories
and share insights that inspire curiosity.
The world is too vast to be confined to just one discipline.
So expect a wide variety of topics,
ranging from photography, physics and mathematics
to deep dives into computer systems.
I'm incredibly excited to share my interests
and discuss various topics with you.
